    C

    close() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Closes the harness, releasing all backing resources in the correct order: runtime, then config manager, then platform (which stops the scheduler thread).
    configDir() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     
    configManager() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Returns the config manager owned by this harness.
    console() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     
    create(Path) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Creates a harness rooted at the given config directory using the default logger name.
    create(Path, String) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Creates a harness rooted at the given config directory with a custom logger name.

    D

    debug(String) - Method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
     
    defaultConfigExtension() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     
    dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit - package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit
     
    DiagnosticsTestHarness - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit
    Reusable JUnit harness that boots a self-contained MagicUtils runtime for running diagnostics without a real Minecraft server.

    E

    error(String) - Method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
     
    error(String, Throwable) - Method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
     

    I

    info(String) - Method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
     
    installDiagnostics() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Installs the default diagnostics service (with built-in MagicUtils checks) into the runtime.
    installDiagnostics(Consumer) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Installs the diagnostics service and lets the caller register custom checks, mirroring DiagnosticsSupport.install(MagicRuntime, Consumer).
    INSTANCE - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
    Shared singleton instance.
    isMainThread() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     

    L

    logger() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Returns the logger core owned by this harness.
    logger() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     

    N

    NoOpPlatformLogger - Enum Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit
    No-op PlatformLogger for tests that exercise diagnostics without a real platform.

    O

    onlinePlayers() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     

    P

    platform() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Returns the in-memory test platform.

    R

    runOnMain(Runnable) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     
    runtime() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.DiagnosticsTestHarness
    Returns the runtime container backing this harness.

    S

    scheduler() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
     
    shutdown() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
    Shuts down the backing task scheduler.

    T

    TestPlatform - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit
    In-memory Platform implementation for JUnit-style tests that need to run diagnostics without a real Minecraft server.
    TestPlatform(Path) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.TestPlatform
    Creates a test platform rooted at the given config directory.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.testkit.NoOpPlatformLogger
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
